---
title: "Running log of inventory at Point Whitney"
author: "Ariana Huffmyer"
date: "2026-06-23"
categories: [inventory, wsg-usda]
description: "Assessing inventory and updating inventory logs for Point Whitney"
image: ""
---

<img alt="AI Use Level 0" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/AI%20Use-L0%20None-lightgrey">  
*This icon means that I did not use AI to conduct the work detailed here and did not use AI to write this notebook post.*

# Overview

Today I started cleaning our materials in the attic and started an inventory log. I'll continue to update this as I clean out the attic over the next couple of weeks. 

# Inventory 

- 1 insulated garbage can header 
- 1 box of tubing and plumbing parts
- Sampling box (yellow lid box)
  - Waterproof paper
  - Mesh
  - 0.5 mL tubes
  - Cattle tags (orange and purple)
  - 1 RNA DNA shield
  - Gloves
  - 2 temp probes
  - Glass slides 
  - Freezer tube box 
  - Pens/pencils
  - Kim wipes
  - Timer
  - 1 P1000 pipette
  - 4 calipers
  - Notebook
  - 50 mL tubes
  - Petri dishes
  - 15 mL tubes
  - Plastic little ducks
  - Razer blades 
  
- Other supplies box (yellow lid box)
  - Tripours
  - Puppy pads
  - Zip ties
  - Squirt bottles
  - Large graduated cylinder 

- ~75 small silos
- ~10 large silos
- 20 HUDLs

- 1 microscope
- Box of ducting
- 1 small bucket
- 1 box of logger supplies
- 1 box of heaters and pumps
